title: 8Pcs/4Pairs Corn Holders, Stainless Steel Corn Forks, Corn Cob Holders, BBQ Skewers for Corn on The Cob Skewers with Silicone Handle for Home Kitchen Cooking, Barbecue, Picnic
features: 【Portable & Practical】Combines two Corn Holders, safe and easy to carry, ideal for camping, gatherings, and barbecues. The large handle pins provide a comfortable and secure grip while you enjoy eating your corn on the cob.

【STRIP CORN IN SECONDS】The stainless steel blades of the corn stripping tool allow you to strip an entire cob of corn in just seconds. Simply push a cob of corn through the stripping tool with a twisting motion to remove all of the delicious kernels.
【EASY TO EAT HOT CORN】Simply insert corn holders into either end of hot corn, help you to pick up the corn easily, keep your hand safe and clean. Eating hot corn free and safe.
【INTERLOCK DESIGN FOR SAFETY】With the design of interlocking, the twin prong sweetcorn holders are really safe to use. Prongs slot into handles makes them very safe to keep in the kitchen drawer.
【Application】You can use our corn cob holders set to fork corn to keep fingers away from hot corn, or use corn holders for barbecue, picnic, camping or other outdoor activities.
description: Product Description Specifications: Material: stainless steel, plastic Color: 4 colors/ Red, yellow, blue, green Package Includes: 4 Pairs Corn Holders Corn Holders are perfect for homes or outdoors for barbecues, parties, camping and other activities to add more convenience and fun to your life. WARM NOTE: 1. There may be slight chromatic aberration from pictures 2. Manual measurement, please allow slight error and double check the size before purchasing. 3. It is not suitable for children under 3 years old, and please store safely and away from children when not in use.
